acceptance_conditions.condition: protocol, generated route, frozen portfolio routes, and all source hashes remain exact
12 groups produce 96 rows, 296 executions, and the extra R148 arm appears only on the replacement group
all repaired-portfolio and target-specific routes retain semantic fidelity at least 0.9999999999
portfolio repaired-automatic mean is at least -0.005 and bootstrap lower is at least -0.01
portfolio repaired-target mean is at least -0.005 and bootstrap lower is at least -0.01
all 12 groups have mean repaired-target delta at least -0.02
zero rows have repaired-target regression below -0.05
each target mean is at least -0.01; replacement mean versus target is at least -0.02 and versus R148 foreign is at least +0.01 with zero severe rows
challenge commitment, hidden seeds, row hashes, reveal, and transcript replay
general generation, temporal, cross-machine, hardware, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

challenge_protocol.automatic_rule: fresh optimization-level-3 compile with a hidden transpiler seed
challenge_protocol.portfolio_rule: use the R149 generated route only for Jakarta dense XY and preserve frozen R148 routes for the other 11 groups
challenge_protocol.replacement_diagnostic_rule: recompile the frozen R148 foreign route only for Jakarta dense XY
challenge_protocol.shared_seed_rule: all arms in one row share one simulator seed
challenge_protocol.target_rule: recompile the target-specific R143 route only as a denominator

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported_even_if_accepted: general route-generation advantage, temporal same-device transfer, cross-machine transfer, real hardware, mitigation, protocol soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or solved B4/B8/B10

phase_protocol: commit a fresh secret after public preregistration
derive hidden transpiler, simulator, and bootstrap seeds
replay one generated replacement plus eleven frozen R148 routes
execute target and automatic denominators plus the replacement-only R148 diagnostic arm
reveal and verify the acceptance transcript
research_question: Can a newly generated Jakarta dense-XY route close the sole R148 gap without copying frozen identities or regressing the other 11 groups?
